quotes.text: Not yet, Son of Thorne. Not yet. This is not the day. The day comes. It comes. But Mueh'zala will not engage you here or now.
You will pay dearly for this.
I would step lightly if I were you.
Away with you.
Care to give this one a try?
Have you ever wished you could fly?
Hold this a moment.
My curios can prove quite deadly.
Now, where to put you?
These are more than mere trinkets.
This concludes our transaction.
This should prove... entertaining.
You overestimated your worth.
All... my... plans...
You strike... a hard... bargain...
What have we here? That dusty old loa has sent debt collectors already?!
Well, I, uh... Hey, hold on a minute!
I'll teach you to mess with genius!
Power beyond your comprehension!
Hah! How's that for some Manastorm mojo?
I'm gonna light you... uh, shadow you up!
Lumbering?! The mighty Millhouse Manastorm has never lumbered a day in life!
Now you'll witness my full power for sure!
Ouch! Watch what you're doing, Millificent!
Stop! I'd rather give up the mojo than lose her!
You're the best, Milly! Let's never fight again!
Wait, YOU made a deal with Bwonsamdi too?
Has-been!
Awwww sweetie! You DO care!
